subcodes.first_line: The Word of God hath verily been sent down in truth, adorned with such glory as hath struck with bewilderment all who dwell in the heavens and on earth, save [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلمه الله قد نزلت بالحق بطراز الذی انصعقت عنه کل من فی السموات و الارض الا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
